benchmark_report.methodology: Scientific analysis of randomly selected commands with statistical validation

adaptive-complexity-router.md.description: Intelligent Task Routing Based on Complexity

critical_issues.evidence: 40% of commands violate the complexity < 5 rule
critical_issues.impact: Commands become over-engineered and harder to maintain

critical_issues.evidence: adaptive-complexity-router.md has complexity score of 6 while teaching simplicity
critical_issues.impact: Violates its own principles - hypocrisy detector is off the charts
critical_issues.recommendation: Practice what you preach - simplify the complexity teacher

savage_commentary.overall_assessment: Your commands are like a philosopher who writes 800-line essays about simplicity. The irony is so thick you could cut it with a complexity router.

specific_roasts.roast: 818 lines to teach 'simplicity'? That's like writing a novel about minimalism. Your complexity score of 6 violates your own < 5 rule. Even your simplicity is complicated.
A complexity router with complexity score 6? That's like a diet book written by someone who's never seen a salad. This thing routes complexity while BEING the complexity.
533 lines for 'intelligent' refactoring. The most intelligent thing would be refactoring this command to 50 lines. Session persistence doesn't require a PhD thesis.

backhanded_compliments: Your thinking orchestration is impressively consistent - consistently verbose.
The statistical distribution shows remarkable consistency in over-engineering.
You've achieved perfect mediocrity: exactly 40% rule violations.

immediate_actions: Simplify java-clean-code-generator.md (currently violates its own principles)
Apply the 3-question rule to all commands: Can I use what exists? Can I solve with simple method? Do I need this NOW?
long_term_improvements: Target complexity scores < 3 for all commands
Focus on actionable simplicity over theoretical complexity management
process_improvements: Implement automated complexity scoring in CI/CD
Add rule violation detection in pre-commit hooks
